song.title: O The Joy Of Having Nothing
song.lyrics: [V1] When you appeared, O Lord, called me unto You Your glory filled my heart, made me wholly new. No earthly ties now hold; I count them loss. Though I'm a stranger here, with joy I bear the cross. [C] Oh-oh-oh the joy of having nothing, Being nothing, seeing nothing, But a living Christ in glory, Being careful for nothing. Oh the joy of having nothing, Being nothing, seeing nothing, But a living Christ in glory, And His interests down here.
